positive: A vibrant, geometric vaporwave illustration featuring a stylized neon palm tree silhouette against a retro grid sunset. Use gradients of magenta, cyan, and electric blue. Synthwave aesthetic, 80s vaporwave art, vector style, maximalist.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, muted colors
